offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, maverick spending causes missed discounts. We provide a procurement analytics dashboard instead of manual tracking of invoices and expenses.
problem: Maverick spending and missed savings opportunities
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with a demo video
Share in community forums for Etsy sellers
try_it: Let users try Invoice categorization and Savings alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
